mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, party_role, name1, name2, address1, address2, city, country, postal_code, state_province, account, location
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edi_210_party (invoice_id, party_role, name1, name2, address1, address2, city, country, postal_code, state_province, account, location) VALUES (#{invoiceId}, #{partyRole}, #{name1}, #{name2}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{city}, #{country}, #{postalCode}, #{stateProvince}, #{account}, #{location})

INSERT INTO edi_210_party (invoice_id, party_role, name1, name2, address1, address2, city, country, postal_code, state_province, account, location) VALUES
(#{p.invoiceId}, #{p.partyRole}, #{p.name1}, #{p.name2}, #{p.address1}, #{p.address2}, #{p.city}, #{p.country}, #{p.postalCode}, #{p.stateProvince}, #{p.account}, #{p.location})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edi_210_party WHERE invoice_id = #{invoiceId} AND party_role = #{role} LIMIT 1
